query:
SELECT i.invoice_number, i.subtotal_net, i.tax_amount, i.total_gross,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 0) as required_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 1) as optional_count,
  (SELECT SUM(line_total_net) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id AND is_optional = 1) as optional_net
FROM invoices i WHERE i.invoice_number = 'AN-2026-1861';
